'''Rog''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was [[Marriage/Legends|married]] to [[Gundruk]]. He was the Warlord of the [[Nudskutch]] holding of the [[Bolgoink clan]] and brother of the Clan Warlord [[Vrokk]]. He was a huge and powerful boar, but had a relatively small force under his command and he coveted the larger clan army of his brother.

Rog went along with his wife's plans to eliminate her mother and Rog's brother from the clan leadership.

==Appearances==
